shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc 'pwd && git status --short && rg -n "touchstart|mouseenter|mouseover|scroll|resize|showDelay|delay|hideTooltip|clearTimeout|setTimeout" src test tests 2>/dev/null | head -240'

/bin/bash -lc "rg -n \"touch|openEvents|handleShowTooltipDelayed|handleShow =|setIsOpen|tooltipShowDelayTimerRef\" src/components/Tooltip src/components/TooltipController src/test | head -260 && sed -n '220,430p' src/components/Tooltip/Tooltip.tsx"

/bin/bash -lc "rg -n \"touch\" . --glob '"'!node_modules/**'"' --glob '"'!yarn.lock'"' | head -200; git log -8 --oneline -- src/components/Tooltip/use-tooltip-events.tsx; nl -ba src/components/Tooltip/use-tooltip-events.tsx | sed -n '90,390p'; nl -ba src/components/Tooltip/use-tooltip-events.tsx | sed -n '460,555p'; nl -ba src/components/Tooltip/Tooltip.tsx | sed -n '395,475p'"

/bin/bash -lc "rg -n \"touch\" README.md docs example/src --glob '"'!*.map'"' | head -100; git branch -a; git show HEAD~1:src/components/Tooltip/use-tooltip-events.tsx 2>/dev/null | rg -n \"touch|OpenEvents|actualOpenEvents\" | head -80; git log --all -S'touchstart' --oneline -- src | head -20"
